title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin tested mixed-provider LLM workflows by benchmarking Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 in different configurations for code generation tasks against real GitHub issues. Using Archon, he ran the same workflow four ways to determine optimal planning and implementation splits, then evaluated the resulting PRs on seven quality dimensions.
